title: Validate TUI default filter, popup, and layout toggle behavior
description: Add and run focused TUI tests covering the all-beads default filter, Enter-driven detail popup open/dismiss behavior, removed merge bindings, and wide/compact layout switching while preserving selection and focus expectations.
acceptance_criteria: Automated tests cover default visibility of done beads on initial TUI load.
Automated tests cover opening the detail popup with `Enter` and dismissing it with `Escape`.
Automated tests verify merge bindings are no longer active in the TUI interaction model.
Automated tests cover toggling to compact mode and back to wide mode without losing selection.
Existing relevant TUI test coverage continues to pass after the changes.
